props.name: duration
props.description: Auto-dismiss delay in ms — opt-in. `0` (default) keeps it until closed.

props.name: inverted
props.description: High-contrast inverse surface for maximum visibility. Recommended for transient info outcomes that auto-dismiss (saved, offline, downtime…).

props.name: snack
props.description: Snackbar layout: one compact row (icon + title + inline action), no description.

props.name: component
props.description: Rich body: a Svelte component rendered instead of `text` (ignored in snack).

props.name: iconShape
props.description: Shape of the FeedbackIcon box — `"rounded"` (default) or a full `"round"` circle.

props.name: iconBox
props.description: FeedbackIcon box override (see InlineNotification): force `"tint"`/`"solid"` on a tinted surface.

props.name: onclose
props.description: Called when the notification is dismissed (auto, close button, or action).

props.name: paused
props.description: Hold the auto-dismiss countdown (the region sets this while the whole stack is hovered or focused, so a burst of toasts pauses together — not just the one under the pointer).
